summary: Iteration 18 features testing completed. All 3 features (Packing Sheet PDF enhancements, Print Address with quantities, Address Name field) are working correctly. 16/16 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified working.

minor.issue: Existing addresses created before the feature don't have address_name field. This is expected behavior for legacy data.

critical_code_review_comments: All 3 features implemented correctly and working as expected
Address Name field defaults to customer name when not provided - verified in backend
Print Addresses dialog shows quantity inputs per selected order - verified in frontend
Packing Sheet PDF includes Purpose, Free Samples (with formulation), and Extra Shipping Details - verified via API

features_verified.packing_sheet_purpose: PASS - Order CS-0021 has purpose='Lab testing' and it's included in packing sheet PDF generation
features_verified.packing_sheet_free_samples: PASS - Order CS-0021 has free_samples with formulation='Distilled rose extract 80% + DM water 20%'
features_verified.packing_sheet_extra_shipping: PASS - Order CS-0021 has extra_shipping_details='Handle with care, keep away from heat'
features_verified.print_addresses_with_quantities: PASS - Quantities parameter works correctly, duplicates addresses in PDF
features_verified.print_addresses_dialog_ui: PASS - Dialog shows 'Print Addresses — Set Copies' with quantity inputs per order
features_verified.address_name_default: PASS - address_name defaults to customer name when not provided or empty
features_verified.address_name_in_print: PASS - print-addresses PDF uses address_name from shipping_address
features_verified.address_name_in_packing_slip: PASS - Ship To line in packing slip shows address_name if set
features_verified.address_name_ui_customers: PASS - Customers page Add Address dialog has 'Address Name (Recipient)' field
features_verified.address_name_ui_create_order: PASS - Create Order Add Address dialog has 'Address Name (Recipient)' field with customer name placeholder
features_verified.address_name_display: PASS - Address selector shows address_name prominently (e.g., 'TEST_List_Recipient – TEST List Address Street')

seed_data_creation: Created test addresses with address_name field for testing. Order CS-0021 was pre-configured with purpose, free_samples, and extra_shipping_details.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 features fully tested. Address Name field is now available in all address forms (Customers, CreateOrder, EditOrder, PIBuilder). Print Addresses dialog supports quantity per order. Packing Sheet PDF includes Purpose, Free Samples with formulation, and Extra Shipping Details. Test order CS-0021 has all these fields populated for verification.
